source.additionalInfo:
Variable description: Proportion of countries with clearly defined procedures in law or policy for participation by service users/communities in planning program in water resources planning and management (%) 
 
 Variable code: ER_WAT_PROCED 
 
 Metadata available at: https://unstats.un.org/sdgs/metadata/files/Metadata-06-0b-01.pdf 
 
 Detailed sources: Key indicators of the UN-Water Global Analysis and Assessment of Sanitation and Drinking-Water (GLAAS). For the specific sources by country, refer to http://www.who.int/water_sanitation_health/monitoring/investments/glaas/en/.
